description_long: This kiosk consists of a lightweight, modular pop-up display structure set on a square wooden platform. The main feature is a large, fabric-printed backdrop with a vibrant outdoor cycling advertisement labeled 'HUB', supported by a visible metal truss frame. The kiosk is accompanied by a standing male mannequin dressed in formal attire, suggesting its use for promotional or informational purposes. The display frame is constructed from interlocking metal rods, forming a grid that supports the printed banner. The wooden platform provides a stable, flat base, contrasting with the metallic and fabric elements of the display. There are no visible windows, doors, or enclosed spaces, and the structure is open on all sides.
description: A modular pop-up kiosk with a large printed fabric backdrop on a metal truss frame, set on a wooden platform and accompanied by a standing mannequin. The kiosk is open and designed for promotional use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the printed cycling advertisement, the metal frame behind it, the wooden platform, and the mannequin standing to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the metal truss frame and the profile of the mannequin, with the wooden platform extending forward.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the full metal grid structure supporting the fabric banner, with the mannequin facing away and no signage visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the truss frame's side profile and the mannequin's stance, with the wooden platform extending to the left.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign on fabric banner, placed at the top center of the backdrop, with visible text 'HUB' and an image of a cyclist
attribute_roof_design: none; open structure with no roof, only a vertical backdrop supported by a metal frame
